# exasol_connection_grant (Resource)

Grants access to an Exasol connection to a user or role.

Connections are used for IMPORT/EXPORT operations. By default, only the connection owner can use it. Use this resource to grant access to other users or roles.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "exasol_connection_grant" "s3_to_etl" {
  connection_name = exasol_connection.s3.name
  grantee         = exasol_role.etl_role.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `connection_name` (String) Connection name to grant access to.
- `grantee` (String) User or role name that receives connection access.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Terraform ID in format: CONNECTION_NAME|GRANTEE

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Format: CONNECTION_NAME|GRANTEE
terraform import exasol_connection_grant.s3_to_etl 'MY_S3_BUCKET|ETL_ROLE'
```
